scene.message: Yukino: Hey, Inaba!{nl} Wait up!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: How do we even know{nl} that's really Sonoda?!{waitkey}{ret}
{ret}
{ret}
Yukino: Well,{nl} ...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: It's a pretty mask,{nl} isn't it?{waitkey}{ret}
Ms. Saeko: AAAHHH!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: ...Teacher!{nl} What's wrong?!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: W-what is it?!{waitkey}{ret}
